name: ExtensionCitation_LastReviewDate
title: R5: When the citation record was last reviewed by the publisher (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Citation.lastReviewDate` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Citation.lastReviewDate` 0..1 `date`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Citation.lastReviewDate` 0..1 `date`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Citation.lastReviewDate` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Citation` is not mapped.
Element `Citation.lastReviewDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: When the citation record was last reviewed by the publisher (new)
element.comment:
Element `Citation.lastReviewDate` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Citation` is not mapped.
Element `Citation.lastReviewDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If specified, this date follows the original approval date.

See guidance around (not) making local changes to elements [here](https://hl7.org/fhir/canonicalreso.html#localization).

element.short: When the citation record was last reviewed by the publisher
element.definition: The date on which the resource content was last reviewed. Review happens periodically after approval but does not change the original approval date.
element.comment:
If specified, this date follows the original approval date.

See guidance around (not) making local changes to elements [here](https://hl7.org/fhir/canonicalreso.html#localization).
